name: Naveen Kumar
title: Senior Data Engineer
bio: Senior Data Engineer with expertise in building scalable real-time and batch data pipelines. I architect end-to-end data platforms that power AI/ML systems at scale. Currently building autonomous AI agents that generate production-grade data engineering projects automatically.
shortBio: Senior Data Engineer specializing in AI/ML pipelines, real-time streaming, and autonomous data agents
longBio: I'm a Senior Data Engineer passionate about building production-grade data infrastructure that scales. My work spans real-time streaming pipelines with Apache Kafka and Flink, batch ETL workflows orchestrated by Airflow and dbt, and ML feature engineering platforms. I've designed cloud-native data architectures on AWS and Azure, and I'm currently building autonomous AI agents (NEXUS, APOLLO, ATLAS) that automate data engineering project generation. Based in San Diego, CA.
